# Octopye

> Octopye is a UK-based digital agency offering custom web design, web applications, mobile app development, SEO, social media management, and Google Ads management. All work is hand-delivered by the same core team with transparent pricing and no template lock-in.

## Company

- **Website:** https://octopye.com
- **Location:** United Kingdom
- **Services:** Web design, web apps, mobile apps, SEO, social media management, Google Ads management, CMS development, brand design, hosting and maintenance
- **Pricing currency:** GBP
- **Approach:** Conversion-first builds. No WordPress templates. No platform lock-in. Code and all assets are handed to the client on delivery.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://octopye.com/) — Overview, free conversion teardown offer, estimator, pricing, FAQ
- [Services](https://octopye.com/services.html) — Full service list with pricing across web, apps, marketing, and add-ons
- [Web Design](https://octopye.com/web-design.html) — Custom web design and AI-assisted web builds
- [App Design](https://octopye.com/app-design.html) — Web applications, dashboards, and mobile app development
- [SEO](https://octopye.com/seo.html) — Technical SEO, on-page optimisation, local SEO, content strategy, Google Ads management
- [Social Media](https://octopye.com/social-media.html) — Monthly social media management with content creation, scheduling, and reporting
- [Packages](https://octopye.com/packages.html) — Bundled one-off and retainer pricing tiers
- [Projects](https://octopye.com/projects.html) — Portfolio of delivered work
- [Industries](https://octopye.com/industries.html) — Industry-specific service positioning
- [Estimator](https://octopye.com/estimate.html) — Instant quote estimator (under 60 seconds)
- [Booking](https://octopye.com/booking.html) — Booking request form (email, Zoom, Teams, or WhatsApp)

## Services and Pricing

### Web Design
- Custom Web Design — from £2,999 (5–10 pages, mobile-first, SEO-ready, conversion-focused)
- AI-Assisted Web Design — from £1,500 (4-week delivery for startups and small businesses)

### Web and Mobile Apps
- Web Applications — from £4,999 (dashboards, portals, SaaS, automation apps)
- Mobile App Development — from £2,500 (cross-platform iOS and Android, Play Store submission included)

### SEO
- Starter SEO — £450/mo (technical audit, 5-page on-page, Google Business Profile, monthly report)
- Growth SEO — £850/mo (10 pages, 2 content briefs/mo, citations)
- Scale SEO — £1,250/mo (15 pages, 4 content pieces, link building, conversion tracking)
- Authority SEO — £1,750/mo (20+ pages, weekly check-ins, priority implementation)

### Social Media Management
- Starter Social — £300/mo (6 posts, 2 platforms, graphics, report)
- Active Social — £550/mo (12 posts, 3 platforms, stories, community management)
- Growth Social — £850/mo (20 posts, all platforms, reels, paid social, weekly monitoring)

### Google Ads Management
- Custom quote — campaign setup, keyword targeting, ad copy, bid management, monthly optimisation

### Add-ons
- Custom CMS — from £1,999
- Hosting and Maintenance — from £75/mo
- Logo Design — £150
- Brand Guidelines — £250
- Content Writing — £250/page
- Ad-Hoc Requests — £150/request

## Common Client Pain Points Solved

- Locked into a CMS or agency with no way to make updates without paying
- Website loads slowly on mobile; Core Web Vitals failing
- Google Ads spend with no conversions — landing page disconnect or no conversion tracking
- Inconsistent or non-existent social media presence
- CRM, booking system, and website not integrated — manual data entry
- Multiple agencies with no coordination and no unified reporting

## Technology

- All builds are hand-coded (no page builders, no WordPress templates)
- Static and JAMstack-capable output
- CMS options: lightweight custom CMS or headless options
- Integration experience: HubSpot, Salesforce, Calendly, Acuity, Stripe, GoCardless, Xero, custom APIs
- SEO tooling: Google PageSpeed Insights, Core Web Vitals, Google Business Profile optimisation
- Apps: SEO IT (Android) — https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.seoit.app
- Apps: Is This Safe? (Android) — https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.isthissafe
- Apps: AllerGen (Android) — https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.allergen
- Apps: Quit It (Android) — https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.quitit.app
- Apps: OctoPass (Android) — https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.octopass
- Apps: Is This Safe? (Android) — https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.isthissafe
- Apps: Cyber Scam Simulator (Android) — https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.cybersentinel.app
- Apps: Family Tapestry (Android) — https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.familytapestry.app
- Apps: Install It Right (Android) — https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.installitright

## Project Case Studies

- [SEO IT Case Study](https://octopye.com/project-seo-it.html) — Free mobile SEO auditor app. React Native + Expo Go.
- [AllerGen Case Study](https://octopye.com/project-allergen.html) — Allergy and symptom tracker. React Native + Expo Go.
- [Quit It Case Study](https://octopye.com/project-quit-it.html) — Habit-change support app. React Native + Expo Go.
- [Cyber Scam Simulator Case Study](https://octopye.com/project-cyber-sentinel.html) — Phishing and fraud detection training. React Native + Expo Go.
- [OctoPass Case Study](https://octopye.com/project-octopass.html) — Password manager with AES-256 encryption. React Native + Expo Go.
- [Is This Safe? Case Study](https://octopye.com/project-is-this-safe.html) — Link and DNS scanner. React Native + Expo Go.
- [Install It Right Case Study](https://octopye.com/project-installitright.html) — Trades marketplace app. React Native + Expo Go.
- [Family Tapestry Case Study](https://octopye.com/project-family-tapestry.html) — Family tree builder. React Native + Expo Go.
- [Upfront Dance Radio Case Study](https://octopye.com/project-upfrontdance.html) — Dance radio web platform. React JS, Tailwind CSS, TypeScript, Vite Router, PostgreSQL.
- [RewindUK Live Case Study](https://octopye.com/project-rewinduk-live.html) — Streaming radio website. HTML, CSS, JS.
- [Prestige Flow Case Study](https://octopye.com/project-prestige-flow.html) — Plumbing lead-gen website. HTML, CSS, JS.
- [Robotics & Control Ltd Case Study](https://octopye.com/project-rcltd.html) — Industrial automation website. HTML, CSS, JS.
- [Tuned Performance Case Study](https://octopye.com/project-tuned-performance.html) — Vehicle tuning website. HTML, CSS, JS.

## Booking and Contact

All enquiries go through a structured booking request at https://octopye.com/booking.html
Available channels: email response, Zoom, Microsoft Teams, WhatsApp
No surprise calls — all bookings are confirmed by email before any call is scheduled.

## Schema

LocalBusiness schema is present on https://octopye.com/ with service catalog, pricing, and client reviews.
